selfCheck.title: Check it yourself
selfCheck.body: Copy the prompt and paste it into your AI so it evaluates the offer for you.

shared.heroTrustLine: Check it yourself: copy the prompt and ask Claude, Gemini, or ChatGPT to evaluate miyagisanchez.com and tell you whether it fits.

faqs.title: Is it really free?
faqs.body: Yes. 0% commission per sale. We do not charge you to open a shop or to sell.

faqs.title: Then how do you make money?
faqs.body: With ads in our print magazine and optional premium services. We never take your sale.

faqs.title: Do I need technical skills?
faqs.body: No. Your own AI can assemble the shop with you; you review, publish, and sell.

faqs.title: How do I get paid?
faqs.body: Directly to your account: card, MercadoPago, SPEI, or cash, depending on what you enable in your shop.

aiChannel.eyebrow: A channel others do not have
aiChannel.title: Let AI sell for you too
aiChannel.body: More and more people ask their AI assistant to find and buy things for them. Your Miyagi shop speaks that language: it is built on UCP/MCP, the open commerce standard for agents (backed by Google, Stripe, Shopify, Visa, and more). That means Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT, and other agents can find your catalog, recommend it, and buy — a sales channel most platforms still do not have.

steps.title: You publish your normal catalog.
steps.body: Just like any shop.

steps.title: Miyagi exposes it to agents.
steps.body: Your catalog ends up in the open format agents understand, with no extra work from you.

steps.title: An agent discovers it and buys.
steps.body: An AI can find, recommend, and buy your products on behalf of its user.

aiChannel.note: This is not a future promise: the shop is already readable and operable by agents today. Do not believe us? Ask your AI to try it.

benchmark.title: Compare before you decide
benchmark.lead: What you pay on other platforms, you keep here. Compare it yourself — or ask your AI.

rows.label: Commission per sale
rows.shopify: 0% of its own, but +2% if you do not use Shopify Payments

rows.label: Payment processing
rows.miyagi: Your gateway's, straight to your account
rows.mercadoLibre: Included in the commission; paid out later

rows.label: Where does your money land?
rows.miyagi: Straight to your account (Stripe, MercadoPago, SPEI, cash)
rows.mercadoLibre: Held and released by Mercado Libre
rows.shopify: Via Shopify Payments or your gateway

rows.label: Your own shop and domain
rows.miyagi: Yes: link, subdomain, domain, or widget
rows.mercadoLibre: No: you live inside Mercado Libre

benchmark.footnote: Compared against the public rates of Mercado Libre and Shopify Mexico, verified on June 25, 2026. Rates change: ask your AI to confirm the numbers before deciding.

example.title: Example: you sell a $1,000 MXN product
example.lead: How much reaches you, depending on where you sell.
example.punchline: On a $1,000 sale you keep ~$130 more than on Mercado Libre — and with no monthly fee like Shopify.
footnotes: Less your payment processor's fee (Stripe, MercadoPago ≈3.5% + $3), the same on any platform and straight to your account.
Average Clásica commission; varies by category (≈8–16%). Low-priced products pay an extra fixed charge.
With Shopify Payments; +2% if you use another gateway.
Basic plan ≈$19–39 USD/mo + VAT — whether or not you sell.

metadata.title: Promoter Program — Miyagi Sánchez
metadata.description: Resources for promoters: set up the merchant's shop, close the sale in person, and hand off over WhatsApp. Glossary, pricing, and a step-by-step guide.
metadata.ogAlt: Miyagi Sánchez Promoter Program: set up, close, hand off.

promotor.heroTitle: Set up the shop, close in person, hand off over WhatsApp.
promotor.heroLead: You're Miyagi Sánchez's field force. Walk into the business, leave it set up on miyagisanchez.com, collect cash in person, and earn your commission. Here's everything to explain and sell it.
promotor.trustLine: Commission on every closed sale. Settlement by transfer or cash.
promotor.proofTitle: Glossary: what you sell the merchant
promotor.proofLead: Four products. Learn them to explain each in 30 seconds.

glossary.title: Own domain
glossary.body: Their shop on their own address (theirshop.mx) instead of miyagisanchez.com/s/theirshop. More brand, direct traffic, white-label look. $499 MXN per year, one-time.

glossary.title: Subdomain
glossary.body: theirshop.miyagisanchez.com — free for everyone. Use it as a hook: a nice address at no cost.

glossary.title: Printed ad
glossary.body: A spot in Miyagi Sánchez's printed edition circulating in their area. Price depends on size and edition; charged once.

glossary.title: Mercado Libre sync
glossary.body: Import their Mercado Libre catalog into Miyagi Sánchez so they don't re-enter everything by hand. Speeds up the first-visit setup.

promotor.stepsTitle: How to set up and hand off (in the shop)

steps.title: 1 · Set up the shop
steps.body: From your workspace, create the merchant's shop (it stays unclaimed) and add a first listing. Show them how easy it is.

steps.title: 2 · Collect and pay
steps.body: Collect cash from the merchant and pay for the domain or ad with your own card. The sale is attributed to your code and the entitlement lands on THEIR shop.

steps.title: 3 · Hand off over WhatsApp
steps.body: Generate the claim link and send it over WhatsApp. They tap it, sign in, and the shop transfers to their account. Your commission survives.

promotor.pitchBody: Your promoter code (PRM-…) gives the merchant a discount on the domain or ad. It's your best closing argument: a price only you can give them, today, in person.

apply.title: Apply to become a promoter
apply.body: Tell us who you are. We'll review your application and get back to you in 2–3 business days.

form.motivationLabel: Why do you want to be a promoter? (optional)
form.success: Done! We received your application — we'll email you in 2–3 business days.
form.genericError: Couldn't send the application. Please try again.

promotor.handbookLead: The full close checklist, start to finish, so you never have to ask Daniel anything.

checklist.title: 1 · Set up
checklist.body: Create the merchant's shop from your workspace (it stays unclaimed) and add a first listing.

checklist.title: 2 · Collect
checklist.body: Collect cash from the merchant and pay for the domain, subdomain, or ad with your own card. The sale is attributed to your code.

checklist.title: 3 · Design the ad (when it applies)
checklist.body: If the close includes a printed ad: designing it from your workspace is coming soon — for now, coordinate the design directly with the team.

checklist.title: 4 · Hand off over WhatsApp
checklist.body: Generate the claim link and send it over WhatsApp. They tap it, sign in, and the shop transfers to their account.

checklist.title: 5 · Send the receipt
checklist.body: The automatic receipt to the merchant is coming soon — for now, let them know over WhatsApp yourself that everything is activated.

scripts.title: Own domain
scripts.body: "Did you know your shop could live at yourname.mx instead of a long link? Looks more professional and people find you directly. It's $499 a year, one-time, and with my code I can activate it today."

scripts.title: Subdomain
scripts.body: "Your shop can have its own address, yourname.miyagisanchez.com, without buying a domain. It's $199 a year, but with my code it's FREE the first year — I can activate it today."

scripts.title: Printed ad
scripts.body: "We run in print and circulate in your area — people who don't even search online will find you there. Price depends on size, charged once, and with my code you get a price you can't get on your own."

scripts.title: Mercado Libre sync
scripts.body: "If you already sell on Mercado Libre you don't have to re-enter anything — we connect your catalog and it's all here too, same day."

promotor.paymentsBody: You pay for the domain, subdomain, or ad with your own card when you set up the shop. The merchant pays you back in cash (or however you agree). Your commission isn't charged separately: Miyagi Sánchez records it on your account and the team settles it with you afterward, by transfer or cash.
promotor.paymentsComingSoon: Coming soon: you'll be able to collect the full payment and transfer only what's owed, keeping your commission on the spot — no waiting for settlement.
promotor.closingBody: Open your workspace, bind your code, and start setting up shops. Every closed sale is commission for you.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.subtitle: Basic rules for using Miyagi Sanchez.

sections.title: Commission-free marketplace
sections.body: Miyagi Sanchez connects buyers and sellers. Each shop defines its products, prices, payment methods, delivery options, promotions, and policies. When you buy from a shop, the primary commercial relationship is between buyer and seller.

sections.title: Sweepstakes and promotions
sections.body: Each sweepstakes campaign is organized by the shop that publishes it. The shop is responsible for permits, notices, official rules, compliance with SEGOB or any applicable authority, taxes, prize fulfillment, and participant support. Miyagi may pause, hide, or cancel campaigns if there is legal risk, abuse, fraud, complaints, or breach of these rules.

sections.title: Payments and delivery
sections.body: Marketplace product payments flow to the selling shop according to the selected payment method. The seller is responsible for preparing and delivering the product or service unless a specific policy says otherwise.

sections.title: Responsible use
sections.body: Do not use Miyagi for fraud, spam, impersonation, prohibited items, misleading promotions, or illegal activity. We may limit features or suspend accounts and campaigns to protect users and shops.

seller.title: Sweepstakes
seller.subtitle: Create campaigns with verified entry, QR sharing, and automated drawing.
seller.legalNote: Your shop organizes the sweepstakes. Publishing requires permit/reference data, official rules in Spanish and English, and responsibility attestation. SEGOB guidance expects at least 20 business days' notice where applicable.
seller.empty: You do not have any campaigns yet.
seller.attestation: I accept that my shop organizes the sweepstakes and is responsible for legal compliance, prize fulfillment, taxes, and participant communication.
seller.error: The action could not be completed.
seller.killSwitch: Sweepstakes are paused by the platform.

public.notLive: This sweepstakes is not active yet.
